hle.canonical_pass_notes: NOT VERIFIABLE with current manifest — 2026-04-08. The input schedule navigates to the "Video tests" menu entry and presses A, but that opens a SECOND menu of sub-modes (Basic Mode 3, Basic Mode 4, Degenerate OBJ transforms, Layer toggle, Layer toggle 2, OAM Update Delay, Window offscreen reset) that require further navigation. The capture freezes on that submenu. Prior canonical (e1973b29...) was a cross-runner auto-promote that locked the submenu frame as "pass" — a false positive. Canonical cleared; test needs manifest rework to drive into each sub-mode before it can be meaningfully verified. See .agents/handoff/20260408-mgba-suite-video-manifest-rework.md
